programmes.show_description: Martin Geissler and the team bring you thoughtful conversation and expert analysis covering the most interesting news stories in Scotland.
Joining Radio 5 Live.
News from across Scotland and the world, plus sport, weather, entertainment and big name interviews.
Stephen Jardine gets to the heart of the stories making the news.
News updates from Scotland and beyond, plus all your lunchtime sport, travel and weather.
Michelle McManus brings you feel-good music and chat with celebrity guests.
Len Pennie keeps you up to date on what's happening in the arts and culture scene across Scotland.
Breaking down the day's talking points with comment and opinion, plus sport, travel and weather.
It's bands who continued after someone quit. Take That were fine post-Robbie, Diana decided she was more supreme on her own, and Farrah couldn't handle Destiny's Child anymore!
Anna Massie with the very best of folk and roots music from Scotland and beyond.
4/4. The best company to end the day, with lively chat and some of your favourite tunes.

Des Clarke hosts Scotland's award-winning satirical news quiz.
Nicola Meighan brings you feel-good music and chat with celebrity guests.
Breaking down the day's talking points with comment and opinion, plus sport, travel and weather.
New and classic cuts all played from 7', 12' and vinyl LPs. Grant shares the treasures from his own shopping adventures and discovers the stories about your record collections.
Phoebe I-H and Stephanie Cheape bring you the best unsigned, undiscovered and under-the-radar music Scotland has to offer.
The best company to end the day, with lively chat and some of your favourite tunes.
